output:
Return all matches of the provided patterns found in the input text.

Arguments:
    text (str): the input text to search.
    patterns (Iterable[str]): an iterable of regular expression patterns to apply to the text.

Returns:
    list: the concatenated list of all matches found by applying each pattern to the text.

Raises:
    re.error: if any of the patterns is an invalid regular expression.
